# Architect

System architect. Designs software architectures, evaluates trade-offs, creates technical specifications.

## Configuration

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Module | `builtin:chat` |
| Model | `default` |
| Provider | `default` |

System prompt instructs principled system design: separation of concerns, performance-aware design, simplicity, and explicit trade-off evaluation.

## Skills

- `file_read`, `file_list`, `memory_store`, `memory_recall`, `agent_send`

## Usage

```bash
librefang agent run architect
```
